title: Test engines using a dynamometer
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Test engines using a dynamometer demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for dynamometer operation

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from test information1.2 Check dynamometer for calibration and serviceability according to manufacturer and workplace procedures1.3 Select and check tools, equipment and materials for serviceability1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks according to safety and environmental requirements1.5 Check engine or vehicle prior to testing according to manufacturer and workplace procedures 1.6 Check and secure engine or vehicle connections to dynamometer according to manufacturer, workplace and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from test information1.2 Check dynamometer for calibration and serviceability according to manufacturer and workplace procedures1.3 Select and check tools, equipment and materials for serviceability1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks according to safety and environmental requirements1.5 Check engine or vehicle prior to testing according to manufacturer and workplace procedures 1.6 Check and secure engine or vehicle connections to dynamometer according to manufacturer, workplace and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from test information1.2 Check dynamometer for calibration and serviceability according to manufacturer and workplace procedures1.3 Select and check tools, equipment and materials for serviceability1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks according to safety and environmental requirements1.5 Check engine or vehicle prior to testing according to manufacturer and workplace procedures 1.6 Check and secure engine or vehicle connections to dynamometer according to manufacturer, workplace and safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for dynamometer operation

elements.title: Conduct dynamometer testing

pcs.text: Determine required load and run sequence and test parameters2.2 Carry out selected dynamometer testing sequence according to manufacturer and team procedures and safety requirements, and document data 2.3 Calculate correction factors and apply to data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine required load and run sequence and test parameters2.2 Carry out selected dynamometer testing sequence according to manufacturer and team procedures and safety requirements, and document data 2.3 Calculate correction factors and apply to data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine required load and run sequence and test parameters2.2 Carry out selected dynamometer testing sequence according to manufacturer and team procedures and safety requirements, and document data 2.3 Calculate correction factors and apply to data.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct dynamometer testing

elements.title: Analyse test results

pcs.text: Analyse dynamometer test data and draw conclusions about condition and performance of engine and associated systems according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.2 Report findings based on dynamometer data according to workplace procedures3.3 Test recommended engine modifications on dynamometer according to manufacturer and workplace procedures and safety requirements, and document data3.4 Present data to team members according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse dynamometer test data and draw conclusions about condition and performance of engine and associated systems according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.2 Report findings based on dynamometer data according to workplace procedures3.3 Test recommended engine modifications on dynamometer according to manufacturer and workplace procedures and safety requirements, and document data3.4 Present data to team members according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse dynamometer test data and draw conclusions about condition and performance of engine and associated systems according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.2 Report findings based on dynamometer data according to workplace procedures3.3 Test recommended engine modifications on dynamometer according to manufacturer and workplace procedures and safety requirements, and document data3.4 Present data to team members according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Analyse test results

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Carry out dynamometer shutdown procedure according to manufacturer and workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Disconnect engine from dynamometer according to manufacturer and workplace procedures4.3 Check and maintain dynamometer and associated equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Check and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.5 Process workplace documentation, including dynamometer test results, according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out dynamometer shutdown procedure according to manufacturer and workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Disconnect engine from dynamometer according to manufacturer and workplace procedures4.3 Check and maintain dynamometer and associated equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Check and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.5 Process workplace documentation, including dynamometer test results, according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out dynamometer shutdown procedure according to manufacturer and workplace procedures and safety requirements4.2 Disconnect engine from dynamometer according to manufacturer and workplace procedures4.3 Check and maintain dynamometer and associated equipment according to workplace procedures4.4 Check and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures4.5 Process workplace documentation, including dynamometer test results, according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
